title: AI Search Trace Receipt
description: A privacy-preserving trace receipt for AI-mediated search events.

schema_version.description: The schema version of this AI Search Trace Receipt.

trace_id.description: A non-reversible identifier for this trace receipt.

event_type.description: The fixed event type for AI search trace receipts.

timestamp_bucket.description: A rounded timestamp bucket. This should not be a precise behavioral timestamp.

sampling.description: Sampling information for the search trace event.

sampled.description: Indicates whether this search event was sampled.

sampling_method.description: The sampling strategy used for this trace receipt.

sampling_rate_hint.description: Optional approximate sampling rate used by the system.

encoding.description: Optional declaration of the encoding model used to convert AI search behavior into structured trace fields.

encoding_model.description: The type of encoding model used for this receipt.

codebook_version.description: The version of the codebook used to interpret encoded fields.

binary_representation.description: Whether binary representation is explicitly defined by the standard or handled implicitly by storage and transport systems.

raw_signal_policy.description: The policy for handling raw search signals before or during encoding.

query_trace.description: Minimized trace information about the query without storing the raw query.

query_fingerprint.description: A privacy-preserving semantic or cryptographic fingerprint of the query.

intent_code.description: Encoded broad intent category of the search event.

sensitivity_bucket.description: Broad sensitivity category of the search event.

source_trace.description: Minimized trace information about sources touched during AI search.

source_count.description: The number of sources touched or considered by the AI search process.

source_fingerprints.description: Hashed or otherwise non-reversible source identifiers.

citation_count.description: The number of citations or explicit source references included in the answer.

source_class_codes.description: Encoded broad source categories touched during the search event.

source_interactions.description: Optional minimized records describing how sources were interacted with during the AI search event.

source_fingerprint.description: A non-reversible identifier for the source involved in this interaction.

interaction_type.description: The type of interaction between the AI search process and the source.

influence_level.description: A broad estimate of how much this source influenced the generated answer. This is not a royalty weight or legal attribution score.

usage_mode.description: The role this source played in the answer or search process.

content_stored.description: Must be false. Raw source content must not be stored inside the trace receipt.

answer_trace.description: Minimized trace information about the generated answer without storing the raw answer.

answer_digest.description: A digest of the generated answer. The raw answer text must not be stored here.

confidence_bucket.description: Broad confidence category for the generated answer.

transformation_code.description: Encoded description of the transformation performed by the AI.

user_action_trace.description: Optional minimized signal describing the user's follow-up action.

privacy.description: Privacy boundary declaration for the trace receipt.

raw_query_stored.description: Must be false. The raw user query must not be stored in the receipt.

raw_answer_stored.description: Must be false. The raw AI answer must not be stored in the receipt.

personal_id_linked.description: Must be false. The receipt must not be directly linked to a personal identifier.

privacy_level.description: The privacy treatment applied to this receipt.

retention_policy.description: The retention policy applied to this receipt.

integrity.description: Integrity metadata used to verify the trace receipt without preserving raw content.

previous_receipt_hash.description: Optional hash of a previous receipt for chained integrity.

hooks.description: Optional future integration hooks for related systems.

royalty_hook.description: Indicates whether this receipt may be used by a future royalty or attribution system.

memory_hook.description: Indicates whether this receipt may be used by a future memory system.

rumination_hook.description: Indicates whether this receipt may be used by a future reflection or rumination system.

human_review_required.description: Indicates whether this receipt requires human review.
